title: vernonia volkameriifolia subsp. siamica
intro: Vernonia volkameriifolia subsp. siamica, also known as Thai Ironweed, is a plant species within the Asteraceae family, native to Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving digestion. Vernonia volkameriifolia subsp. siamica is often used in herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
